text.title: Internal Developer Platform (IDP) Core Model Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the methodology end-to-end with decision gates.

step.name: decide-apply-vs-skip
step.action: Decision tree on org scale + leadership commitment.
step.decision-gate: If decision != apply, STOP and document `skip-this-methodology` rationale.

step.name: discover-personas
step.action: Author persona pain table from interviews.

step.name: define-metrics-team
step.action: Pin DORA + adoption + NPS; staff team.

step.name: publish-charter-validate
step.action: Publish IDP charter; run validator; commit.
step.decision-gate: If validator exits non-zero, return to the previous draft step and fix violations.
